final:
module d_flip_flop (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rstn,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rstn) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (!rstn) begin
            q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
    
endmodule
